---
title: "Blog"
description: "Reflexiones y recursos sobre ciencia abierta, reproducibilidad y metodología"
toc: false
listing:
  id: blog-listing
  contents: "posts/*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  sort: "date desc"
  feed: true
---

::: {#blog-listing}
:::
